policyDispositions.risk: Owner source-prefix classification can conceal an unowned landing zone if broadened.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep every app-core family classified by a concrete owner; change the policy only with topology proof.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep every app-core family classified by a concrete owner; change the policy only with topology proof.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad owner-file exceptions can conceal direct localStorage, history, or BroadcastChannel access.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep entries file-exact and remove them when the browser side effect moves behind an adapter.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep entries file-exact and remove them when the browser side effect moves behind an adapter.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad adapter prefixes can admit product code to browser globals.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep prefixes limited to canonical adapters and test infrastructure; review every added prefix.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep prefixes limited to canonical adapters and test infrastructure; review every added prefix.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad content-runtime references can bypass dynamic registration ownership.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep references limited to exact build, registration, and guard owners.
policyDispositions.remediation: Remove the reference or route it through the canonical content-runtime owner.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad coverage exclusions can hide owned production targets from rollout proof.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exclusions limited to generated, declaration, and explicit non-product files.
policyDispositions.remediation: Remove or narrow the exclusion and assign the target to its real coverage owner.

policyDispositions.risk: A broad dead-export ignore can preserve unused public surface.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep ignores file-exact and remove them with the associated compatibility proof.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep ignores file-exact and remove them with the associated compatibility proof.

policyDispositions.risk: A broad floating-surface allowlist can create unowned z-order and interaction behavior.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exceptions family-exact and retain interaction ownership with the canonical surface.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exceptions family-exact and retain interaction ownership with the canonical surface.

policyDispositions.risk: A broad glass-style allowlist can bypass reusable UI ownership and token policy.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exceptions component-exact and move reusable styling into @sniptale/ui.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exceptions component-exact and move reusable styling into @sniptale/ui.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad design-system ignores can allow feature UI to bypass reusable UI ownership.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep ignores file-exact and limited to reviewed feature-owned surfaces.
policyDispositions.remediation: Move the UI to its canonical owner or remove the exact ignored file.

policyDispositions.risk: A broad modal allowlist can bypass canonical modal composition and accessibility policy.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exceptions component-exact and use the shared modal surface.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exceptions component-exact and use the shared modal surface.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad test-like filtering can suppress security findings in production modules with ambiguous names.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep suffix filters explicit and prove production-like negative paths remain visible.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep suffix filters explicit and prove production-like negative paths remain visible.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad generated or dependency exclusions can suppress real secrets in owned source.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exclusions limited to deterministic generated/dependency paths and use redacted negative fixtures.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exclusions limited to deterministic generated/dependency paths and use redacted negative fixtures.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad focused-proof exclusions can suppress required high-risk validation.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exclusions limited to exact generated or non-product proof files.
policyDispositions.remediation: Remove the exclusion or route the exact high-risk owner to canonical proof.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad exclusions can leave user-visible text outside locale ownership.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exclusions limited to non-user copy, tests, generated data, and canonical exceptions.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exclusions limited to non-user copy, tests, generated data, and canonical exceptions.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad workspace or ignore globs can hide dead exports and unused packages.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep globs bounded to real package roots and review every ignore/wildcard change.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep globs bounded to real package roots and review every ignore/wildcard change.

policyDispositions.risk: A broad or stale dependency-license exception can permit incompatible content into the distributed artifact.
policyDispositions.rationale: The hard-fail license policy keeps package, version, expression, development-only scope, owner, expiry, and debt linkage exact.
policyDispositions.remediation: Review dependency scope and artifact inclusion, then narrow or remove the exact exception; never add a package wildcard.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad console exceptions can bypass structured redaction and diagnostics ownership.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep logging exceptions file-exact and route other output through the platform logger.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep logging exceptions file-exact and route other output through the platform logger.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad test-stub filtering can hide production-like direct Chrome coupling in tests.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exceptions file-exact and prefer FakeRuntimeMessagingTransport.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exceptions file-exact and prefer FakeRuntimeMessagingTransport.

policyDispositions.risk: Default transport imports can conceal owner seams and make message routes hard to trace.
policyDispositions.rationale: Burn the exact import population down when owner adapters replace default sends; never add a broad path.
policyDispositions.remediation: Burn the exact import population down when owner adapters replace default sends; never add a broad path.

policyDispositions.risk: An orchestration exception can hide a multi-step transport workflow inside a generic helper.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exceptions function-exact; the current intended population is empty.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exceptions function-exact; the current intended population is empty.

policyDispositions.risk: Naming exceptions can preserve redundant owner prefixes and ambiguous facades.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exceptions file-exact and remove them when the entrypoint name is normalized.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exceptions file-exact and remove them when the entrypoint name is normalized.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad release-inventory exclusions can omit contributor or legal surface consumers.
policyDispositions.rationale: Ignore only generated, dependency, and repository-metadata directories.
policyDispositions.remediation: Remove the directory exclusion or prove it contains no owned release surface.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad ignored roots can suppress lint findings in owned source.
policyDispositions.rationale: Limit ignored roots to generated, dependency, or explicitly non-source trees.
policyDispositions.remediation: Limit ignored roots to generated, dependency, or explicitly non-source trees.

policyDispositions.risk: A widened package edge can invert the reusable dependency DAG.
policyDispositions.rationale: Change allowed edges only with package-boundary and transitive-consumer proof.
policyDispositions.remediation: Change allowed edges only with package-boundary and transitive-consumer proof.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad boundary exceptions can permit mutable DOM state into canonical snapshots.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep boundary owners file-exact and remove exceptions when adapters become pure.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep boundary owners file-exact and remove exceptions when adapters become pure.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad discovery exclusions can hide an unclassified policy or exception surface.
policyDispositions.rationale: Exclude only generated, dependency, coverage, distribution, and Git metadata roots.
policyDispositions.remediation: Remove or narrow the traversal exclusion so owned tooling remains discoverable.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad source or security ignores can hide owned code from deterministic checks.
policyDispositions.rationale: Review every ignore-pattern change against product roots and security scan coverage.
policyDispositions.remediation: Review every ignore-pattern change against product roots and security scan coverage.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad production-source ignores can hide owned modules from architecture checks.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep production exclusions limited to explicit test and support paths.
policyDispositions.remediation: Remove or narrow the exact ignored path before extending architecture coverage.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad storage-owner prefixes can permit feature code to mutate concrete storage.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep prefixes limited to authoritative persistence owners and remove obsolete owner paths.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep prefixes limited to authoritative persistence owners and remove obsolete owner paths.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad return-bag exclusions can hide mixed action, state, and transport surfaces.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep exclusions limited to canonical factories and framework-shaped results.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep exclusions limited to canonical factories and framework-shaped results.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad root-file exceptions can recreate unowned entrypoint scatter.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep root files limited to declared entry, manifest, and sandbox artifacts.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep root files limited to declared entry, manifest, and sandbox artifacts.

policyDispositions.risk: A broad root exception can hide import-time behavior and test-order coupling.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep each entry file-exact with justification and remove it when initialization moves.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep each entry file-exact with justification and remove it when initialization moves.

policyDispositions.risk: Missing or broadened runtime roots can weaken cross-runtime ownership checks.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep every runtime, manifest owner, and entrypoint explicit and current.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep every runtime, manifest owner, and entrypoint explicit and current.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad SCC ignores can hide owner cycles or outgoing backedges.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep ignored topology and composition paths narrow; update only with exact SCC proof.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep ignored topology and composition paths narrow; update only with exact SCC proof.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad network ownership can bypass credential and private-network policy.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep credentialed fetch and secret-header owners exact and security-reviewed.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep credentialed fetch and secret-header owners exact and security-reviewed.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad storage ownership can expose secrets, sensitive retention, or unsanitized diagnostics.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep secret, retention, and sanitizer owners exact and security-reviewed.
policyDispositions.remediation: Keep secret, retention, and sanitizer owners exact and security-reviewed.

policyDispositions.risk: Broad shared-owner index paths can conceal import-time side effects behind root facades.
policyDispositions.rationale: Keep the list limited to exact shared domain owner indexes.
policyDispositions.remediation: Remove the exception when the root becomes side-effect-free or moves to an explicit init owner.

policyDispositions.remediation: Narrow or remove the source collection, then regenerate its exact disposition.
